allow: Bash(node src/cli/index.js ui click --text "Add to chart")
Bash(node src/cli/index.js ui find --text "Add to chart")
Bash(node src/cli/index.js ui find --aria-label "Add to chart")

Bash(node src/cli/index.js ui eval --js "Array.from\(document.querySelectorAll\('button'\)\).filter\(b => b.textContent.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('add'\) || b.textContent.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('chart'\) || b.getAttribute\('aria-label'\)?.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('add'\)\).map\(b => \({text: b.textContent.trim\(\).substring\(0,40\), aria: b.getAttribute\('aria-label'\), name: b.getAttribute\('data-name'\)}\)\)")
Bash(node src/cli/index.js indicator remove --name "4H Trend Follow Swing Trader")

Bash(node src/cli/index.js ui eval --js "Array.from\(document.querySelectorAll\('button'\)\).map\(b => \({text: b.textContent.trim\(\).substring\(0,50\), aria: b.getAttribute\('aria-label'\), name: b.getAttribute\('data-name'\)}\)\).filter\(b => b.text || b.aria\)")

Bash(node src/cli/index.js ui eval --js "Array.from\(document.querySelectorAll\('[class*=\\"pine\\"] button, [class*=\\"editor\\"] button, [data-name*=\\"add\\"], [data-name*=\\"chart\\"], [class*=\\"addToChart\\"], [class*=\\"add-to\\"]'\)\).map\(b => \({text: b.textContent.trim\(\).substring\(0,50\), aria: b.getAttribute\('aria-label'\), name: b.getAttribute\('data-name'\), cls: b.className.substring\(0,60\)}\)\)")
Bash(npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector --cli node src/index.js --method tools/call --tool-name capture_screenshot --tool-arg region=full)
Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\).split\('\\n',1\)[1]\) m = d.get\('metrics', {}\) for k,v in m.items\(\): print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) ")

Bash(node -e " const WebSocket = require\('ws'\); const http = require\('http'\); http.get\('http://localhost:9222/json', \(res\) => { let d=''; res.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); res.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const page = JSON.parse\(d\)[0]; const ws = new WebSocket\(page.webSocketDebuggerUrl\); ws.on\('open', \(\) => { ws.send\(JSON.stringify\({id:1, method:'Runtime.evaluate', params:{ expression: \\` \(function\(\) { const panel = document.querySelector\('.bottom-widgetbar-content.backtesting'\); if\(panel\) { panel.scrollTop = 1200; return 'scrolled to ' + panel.scrollTop; } return 'not found'; }\)\(\) \\`, returnByValue: true }}\)\); }\); ws.on\('message', \(msg\) => { const r = JSON.parse\(msg\); if\(r.id===1\) { console.log\(r.result?.result?.value\); ws.close\(\); } }\); setTimeout\(\(\)=>ws.close\(\), 5000\); }\); }\); ")
